recommended_sample.title: One Fourteen 114 Clean Up Cap
recommended_sample.why: Premium 47 Brand blank is the best retail-positioned hat if the DTF mark looks clean in mockup.

backup_sample.title: One Fourteen 114 Whiskey Row Dad Hat
backup_sample.why: Embroidery may feel more premium if the 47 Brand DTF mark looks too flat.

pre_order_checks: Check front mark scale on the cap mockup.
Make sure the mark sits centered and not too low on the crown.
Prefer the 47 Brand cap if the mark looks clean.
Prefer the Yupoong embroidered cap if the 47 Brand DTF finish looks cheap.
Do not publish to Etsy until a physical sample is approved.
